---
title: "More kroki formats"
---

Beyond [PlantUML](plantuml.qmd), a batch of formats renders through the
same [kroki](https://kroki.io/) backend: D2, C4-PlantUML, Structurizr,
erd, ditaa, pikchr, svgbob, and TikZ. @fig-d2 is a D2 diagram authored
inline:

```{.d2 #fig-d2 fig-cap="The render pipeline, in D2"}
filter -> cache: lookup
cache -> renderer: miss
renderer -> svg: emit
svg -> document: native figure
```

Every kroki format also works as a file reference
(`![](figures/arch.d2)`) with the same captions, cross-references, and
caching as local backends.
